arts.ttl: Wolves vs Man Utd preview: Pereira backs Amorim for Premier League success
arts.sum: Defiant Ruben Amorim insists Marcus Rashford's absence is not a distraction and that he knows what he is doing as the head coach seeks to get the best out of the forward and turn Manchester United around. The 27-year-old fuelled speculation by admitting he was "ready for a new challenge" in a midweek interview, meaning the England international remained a hot topic ahead of the Boxing Day trip to Wolves.

arts.ttl: How to watch Wolves vs Manchester United: TV channel and live stream for Premier League today

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim ready to ignore Marcus Rashford's best chance of Man Utd redemption
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has been frozen out by Ruben Amorim following his explosive interview, with the star unlikely to be handed a chance to earn redemption in the Boxing Day trip to Wolves

arts.ttl: Napoli & Man Utd Touted for High-Profile Swap Deal
arts.sum: Napoli and Manchester United could arrange a mouth-watering swap deal in January involving Victor Osimhen and Marcus Rashford. According to recent reports in England, Ruben Amorim is keen on the Partenopei loanee after an underwhelming start to Old Trafford life. The post Napoli & Man Utd Touted for High-Profile Swap Deal appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
